caption: The video appears to be a presentation or lecture, likely focused on systems thinking and modeling. The presenter, Gene Bellinger, is visible in a small window on the right side of the screen, wearing headphones and speaking. The main content of the video is displayed on a dark background with various interconnected nodes and labels, suggesting a complex network or system. The central node is labeled "developing models," indicating that this is a key concept being discussed. There are also other nodes such as "start where," "learn modeling," and others, which seem to represent different stages or components of the process being explained. A diagram in the bottom left corner shows a circular flow with arrows connecting different elements, further illustrating the cyclical nature of the topic. The overall layout and design suggest an educational or instructional purpose, aimed at teaching viewers about the principles and practices of systems modeling.
